title: Son of the Guardsman
writer: George H. Plympton, Harry L. Fraser, Lewis Clay
actors: Robert Shaw, Daun Kennedy, Robert 'Buzz' Henry
plot: England, 12th century. David Trent is a nobleman who forms an outlaw group to combat his evil uncle Sir Edgar Bullard. Bullard has kidnapped Louise, the daughter of his rival Lord Markham. The outlaws of Sherwood Forest are champi...
